articles.title: Oil prices tumble again on US-Iran deal; S&P 500 falls
articles.description: Oil prices fell more than 5% on Tuesday, extending this week's losses on hopes a U.S.-Iran deal to end the Middle East war will allow oil to flow through the Strait of Hormuz, while technology shares...

articles.title: Why are oil prices down while gold and silver prices up today? Reasons behind crude oil fall, precious metals rally, analyst insights and market outlook
articles.description: Why are oil prices down while gold and silver prices up today? Oil prices fell to a three-month low as hopes grew that the Strait of Hormuz could reopen under a proposed U.S.-Iran agreement. At the same time, gold and silver prices moved higher because lower oil prices reduced inflation concerns and eased expectations of future interest-rate hikes. Analysts are now watching crude oil demand, Federal Reserve policy, and precious metals trends for the next market move.

articles.title: Oil Falls Below $80 For First Time Since March As US-Iran Deal Hopes Rise; Stocks Mixed With Dow At Record, Nasdaq Slips 1.2%
articles.description: Oil prices fell below $80 for first time since March as Brent dropped 5.1% to $78.96 on US-Iran deal hopes to reopen Strait of Hormuz, as US stocks were mixed with Dow up 328 points to record 51,999, S&P down 0.6% and Nasdaq down 1.2% on AI tech selloff.

articles.title: Iran truce eases oil prices, but inflation risks remain
